Kid-Friendly Restaurants in Clapham

Known as London's Nappy Valley, Clapham is packed with family-friendly restaurants that understand exactly what parents need.

British Gastropub

The Windmill

A Clapham institution beloved by local families, with a kids menu, beer garden, and staff who actually mean it when they say child-friendly.
